summary: 10 changes, 3 waves. W0 serial: c101 bootstrap (4 pillars + live run on this box) then c102 PoC scaffold + first-ever full codegen pipeline (highest-information). W1: chat->memory->local-model->sync sequential on the app; whisper (codex) + CI (codex) parallel. W2: mcp+agent, settings+mobile-model. Decisions resolved: PEM local-tarball pre-resolve (prebuilt dist verified) w/ fallback; sync via local docker compose w/ stub fallback; bootstrap check/--install/--full tiers. Success = demo narrative runs live on macOS+iOS-sim+web, CI green. First change: c101.
